Information:

  • Cloud ceiling is derived as lowest model layer where RH is greater than or equal to 95%.
  • Visibility is derived using the model visibility variable, using the grid point value closest to each TAF site.
  • Momentum Transfer (PBL Winds): Indicates potential surface wind gusts mixed downward through the Planetary Boundary Layer.
    • Mom Mean: Average wind speed across the mixing layer.
    • Mom Max: Peak wind speed found at the apex/top boundary of the mixed layer.
  • Wind Shear thresholds are defined as follows:
    • Marginal: Shear magnitude ≥ 20 kt
    • Moderate: Shear magnitude ≥ 30 kt
    • High: Shear magnitude ≥ 40 kt

* Note: Normal operational criteria are uncolored (white).
